overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, showing a slow walk through a rain-soaked, neon-lit city street at night. The camera moves steadily forward beneath towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, passing under an overpass with bright digital billboards illuminating the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-slicked pavement toward an overpass, observing the neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic displays

entered.detail: large floating digital advertisement displaying a face, glowing with yellow and red neon light
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows towering in the background
concrete highway overpass with support columns spanning the street ahead
white or silver sedan parked on the right side of the wet street
reflective wet ground surface mirroring the blue and yellow neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking forward along wet pavement. A large holographic billboard glows on the left while skyscrapers rise in the distance, and a parked sedan sits ahead on the right beneath an approaching overpass.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass structure, reducing sky visibility
passing the parked sedan on the left side as it falls behind the camera

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the concrete overpass, moving past the stationary vehicle

entered.detail: tall illuminated billboard displaying a figure in white clothing against a bright background
building exterior with vertical red neon light strips running up the structure

segments.scene_description: Moving under the overpass, the scene becomes more enclosed with the sky mostly blocked by concrete. The camera passes the parked car on the left while a bright vertical advertisement and red neon lights become visible on the right building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage under overpass with bright advertising displays

events.description: approaching the brightly lit vertical advertisement, increased illumination on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking close to the right wall, passing the intensely illuminated advertisement panel

entered.detail: smooth gray building wall surface with reflective wet patches

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera moves through a narrow enclosed passage directly beneath the overpass, hugging the right wall. The bright vertical advertisement dominates the right side of the frame, casting strong light on the nearby concrete wall while the distant holographic billboard remains visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a foggy cyberpunk street that gradually transitions from an open urban vista into a narrow, neon-lit underpass. It begins on wet pavement beneath towering skyscrapers, moving past a glowing holographic billboard on the left and toward a parked sedan. As the camera passes under the concrete overpass, the environment becomes more enclosed, shifting the focus toward a bright vertical advertisement and red neon lights on the right building facade. The scene then tightens as the camera hugs the right wall within the passage, where the intense light from the vertical sign dominates the frame while the distant holographic glow lingers on the left.
